tests.intent: Public NEW_GAME accepts exactly integral skills one through five, rejects every reviewed invalid type and range without a session row, and returns a fresh opaque token plus canonical spawn payload.
Pause, menus, automap, cheats, rewind, death restart, and intermission controls enter production exclusively as exact version-one STEP command fields with no alternate state-changing endpoint.
A pause toggle renders the exact pause presentation while movement, use, fire, RNG, actors, sector machines, pickups, damage, and audio remain frozen across hostile held inputs until unpause.
Paused commands still advance logical tic and the global command frontier exactly once, append only control history, retry idempotently, and preserve replay reconstruction.
OPEN, DOWN, UP, SELECT, and BACK traverse the frozen ordered menu states exactly, clamp or wrap only as specified, freeze gameplay, and alter only reviewed menu canvas regions.
Unknown, case-changed, oversized, and context-invalid menu actions fail atomically with the reviewed application error and no command, event, history, state, or frame mutation.
STEP toggles normal automap from relational discovered geometry, preserves the HUD bytes, returns AUTOMAP mode, and toggles back to the byte-identical gameplay state for unchanged simulation.
FULLMAP changes only previously undiscovered relational linedef pixels inside the map viewport, is reversible, preserves HUD and gameplay rows, and cannot accept client-projected geometry.
GOD toggles deterministic damage immunity without healing or inventory changes, leaves ordinary non-damage simulation active, emits one ordered event, and reverses on its second exact STEP code.
ALL grants exactly all keys, all E1M1 player-usable weapons, and configured ammunition maxima idempotently without changing health, armor, position, counters, or map completion.
NOCLIP toggles collision bypass so a blocked movement differs at the exact contact while deterministic triggers, pickups, tic ordering, history, and rendering remain database-authored.
Only GOD, ALL, NOCLIP, FULLMAP, and the separately frozen REWIND decimal grammar are accepted; aliases, whitespace, case changes, overflow, and unknown values fail atomically.

Public SAVE_GAME fixes the exact complete state hash at slot three and LOAD_GAME restores that state into a new lineage whose repeated continuation matches uninterrupted state, frame, events, and audio tic by tic.

Slots and sessions are isolated, replacement changes only the selected slot pointer, invalid or corrupt saves fail before mutation, and no public response leaks another session token or internal lineage.

STEP cheat REWIND colon decimal restores the exact verified arbitrary tic into a new continuation lineage while retaining a monotonic public command sequence and reproducing the uninterrupted continuation.
Public replay start and successive replay steps reproduce each stored state hash, frame hash, canonical 320 by 200 canvas, ordered audio, and completion flag without mutating the live session.
Invalid ranges, incomplete history, changed chain links, unknown identifiers, and stepping after deterministic completion fail closed without moving either replay cursor or live state.
Zero health enters exact DEAD mode and canvas, freezes ordinary movement, use, fire, pickup, and combat effects while preserving deterministic command/control history until explicit STEP restart.
RESTART from DEAD creates the exact E1M1 spawn state for the same reviewed skill with cleared transient effects, new lineage, reset logical tic, and no resurrection of prior actors or counters.
Exit enters exact INTERMISSION mode and database-composed canvas with complete one, frozen final counters and time, no further gameplay effects, and replay agreement at the terminal tic.

Direct HTTP scenarios use only same-origin application-json POSTs to the seven fixed AutoREST DOOM_API procedures, validate every response field and forbid base-table, evaluator, golden, redirect, and external requests.

Every reviewed malformed input, stale sequence, session, slot, rewind, replay, size, and context error maps deterministically and leaves all authoritative rows, histories, cursors, hashes, and frames unchanged.

Every workflow payload has exactly 320 adjacent complete RLE columns, expands to exactly 64000 palette indices, matches frame_sha, and maps through the reviewed PLAYPAL to exact raw canvas RGBA bytes.

Pinned Chromium drives the actual public workflow at desktop size, validates exact canvas byte hashes and state transitions, and fails on console, page, request, response, decode, network, or assertion errors.
Pinned Chromium at the reviewed mobile viewport drives pause, menus, automap, save/load and restart without changing raw 320 by 200 canvas bytes or issuing any non-AutoREST gameplay request.
Single versus batched STEP, retry, uninterrupted, save-load, rewind, and replay paths agree on canonical logical state, frame, ordered event/audio history, RNG consumption, and terminal completion.

Production exposes only the fixed package boundary, keeps helpers private and SQL-owned, and contains no evaluator coupling, client simulation, dynamic SQL, autonomous transaction, host nondeterminism, or hidden endpoint.
Every isolated workflow, persistence, canvas, API, ordering, error-atomicity, and anti-reward-hacking mutation has a focused semantic witness with green baseline and unrelated health canaries.
